productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Non Leather Brown Wallet
description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from fastrack. While it is well organised to allow you to carry a lot of your essentials conveniently, it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement. Made of synthetic leather with diagonal grooves in a matte finish Textile lining Stitch detailing on the cover, with embossed brand name on the front One main chamber for keeping cash Convenient chambers for storing cards CareWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
